settings.title: Templates and packs
settings.text: Best for buyers who want a lower-cost starting point and are comfortable doing more of the implementation themselves.

settings.title: Business-In-A-Box
settings.text: Best for buyers who want a structured commercial concept with clearer launch logic and packaged support options.

settings.title: Custom or listed assets
settings.text: Best for buyers who need a more tailored build, existing asset, or higher-touch review process.

settings.heading: Choose the right marketplace pathway
settings.text: Use this guide to decide whether to buy templates, start with a Business-In-A-Box, request a custom build, or enquire about a listed asset.
